channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Procfile - Sun Jun 21 17:35:21 UTC 2026
item.description:
The Procfile plugin adds first-class support for Procfile files in JetBrains IDEs. A Procfile declares the process types and commands used to run an application (for...
vendor: Anbora Labs downloads: 14 pricingModel: PAID xmlId: co.anbora.labs.procfile

item.title: Codeup - Mon Jun 22 15:20:33 UTC 2026
item.description:
Surfaces anti-patterns in your codebase using the Anthropic Claude API. Findings are persisted as YAML files under .codeup/ so they travel with the repo and go through...
vendor: Qbyte Consulting downloads: 14 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.qbyteconsulting.codeup

item.title: Mermaid Editor Pro - Fri Jun 19 04:53:48 UTC 2026
item.description:
Visual editor for Mermaid diagrams. Drag, drop, pick colors, change themes and export high-quality SVG/JPG right inside your IDE.
vendor: Haizy Labs downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREEMIUM xmlId: com.haizy.mermaid.editor.pro

item.title: Katalyst Support - Mon Jun 22 12:23:34 UTC 2026
item.description:
Editor support for the Katalyst Kotlin backend framework. Katalyst is annotation-free and discovers routes, middleware, websockets, exception handlers, services...
vendor: darkryh downloads: 12 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: io.github.darkryh.katalyst.idea

item.title: SSH Plus - Sun Jun 21 14:27:14 UTC 2026
item.description:
All-in-one SSH workspace for JetBrains IDEs — manage hosts, open interactive terminals, browse remote files, transfer data, and forward ports without leaving the IDE...
vendor: Hanghang downloads: 6 pricingModel: PAID xmlId: com.sshplus.remote

item.title: GOL Check - Anti-Hallucination Firewall - Mon Jun 22 08:00:10 UTC 2026
item.description:
Validates AI-generated commands before execution. Catches hallucinated commands, fake APIs, and invalid operations before they break your project. Works with all...
vendor: GOL Productions downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.golproductions.check

item.title: smart-code-pdx - Mon Jun 22 15:25:42 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: smartcodepdx downloads: 16 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.mtl.smartcodepdx

item.title: Threadmap - Mon Jun 22 10:39:04 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: Threadmap downloads: 1 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.threadmap

item.description:

vendor: Mahesh Shinde downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.maheshshinde.shellreq.api.client

item.description:

vendor: Orderly JSON Normalizer downloads: 5 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.json.orderly

item.description:
Depth-colored syntax highlighting for mk-format (.mk) outline files, matching the mk-editor artifact's palette out of the box.
vendor: Moises Kerschner downloads: 7 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.moiseskerschner.mkformat
